name: browser-automation-playbook
description: Operate interactive websites with Prometheus browser tools, including navigation, clicking, forms, uploads, downloads, dynamic-page extraction, screenshots, and browser UI verification. Use for live browser interaction; do not use for ordinary web research, native desktop apps, or X-specific workflows that have their own skill.

resources.description: Guardrail for recovering browser workflows after no-session, user-Chrome debugger, about:blank, and screenshot-before-open errors.
Browser extraction workflow for product carousels and shopping/product result pages.
Locked-Windows browser fallback note: browser/vision can work under lock even when DOM refs are weak; prefer page text, vision, keyboard, and JS fallback before declaring browser automation blocked.
Browser-adjacent X media escalation: when web_fetch doesn't capture video, use download_media
When to browser_close after automation; SOUL migration
